ogTitle: Old Teal Flat vs One Tree Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Old Teal Flat and One Tree Hill.
heading: Old Teal Flat vs One Tree Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Old Teal Flat, South Australia and One Tree Hill, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: One Tree Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Old Teal Flat (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Old Teal Flat or One Tree Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Old Teal Flat has a flood risk score of 52/100, while One Tree Hill scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Old Teal Flat scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. One Tree Hill scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Old Teal Flat or One Tree Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. One Tree Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
